tagline: Automated video editing tools for content creators

policies.refund: No refunds after 7 days of purchase.
policies.support: 24/7 support is available only on the Pro plan. Basic plan users get email support.
policies.trial: A 7-day free trial is available for both plans.
policies.cancellation: You can cancel your subscription at any time before the next billing cycle.

faq.question: What platforms does AutoStream support?
faq.answer: AutoStream supports YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and any platform where you upload video content.

faq.question: Can I upgrade from Basic to Pro?
faq.answer: Yes, you can upgrade at any time and you will only be charged the difference for the remaining billing period.

faq.question: Does AutoStream support team accounts?
faq.answer: Team accounts are available on the Pro plan. Contact sales for custom pricing.
